name: Sweet Dreams
original_name: ฆ่าฉันในฝันของนาย
overview: A thriller film directed by Tai, becomes a horrifying reality when murders mirror its scenes. With a detective, a psychiatrist, and the haunting return of his ex, he must uncover the true killer before it’s too late.

trailers.title: [ Official Teaser ] ซีรีส์ Sweet Dreams ฆ่าฉันในฝันของนาย | Mono Original
